message:
refactor: extend BTreeSet migration to TLS cert pinning, rustfmt task_table test

- tls/types.rs: Migrate CertificatePinSet from HashSet to BTreeSet, add
  PartialOrd/Ord derives to CertificatePin for BTreeSet key support,
  update test to use BTreeSet
- runtime/task_table.rs: Rustfmt reformatting of test assertion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
